This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] navigator.credentials.create() with one unknown protocol with malformed data and one known protocol with proper data should skip the unknown one and not fail.
  promise_rejects_dom: function "function() { throw e; }" threw object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'create' on 'CredentialsContainer': Failed to read the 'digital' property from 'CredentialCreationOptions': Failed to read the 'requests' property from 'DigitalCredentialCreationOptions': Failed to read the 'data' property from 'DigitalCredentialCreateRequest': Failed to convert value to 'object'." that is not a DOMException AbortError: property "code" is equal to undefined, expected 20
Harness: the test ran to completion.
